claim_boundary: Prefix-probe evidence only; it does not beat D2E paper/repo G-IDM targets and does not complete G005.
diagnosis: Dynamic probability-quantile calibration recovered nonzero button-event recall on held-out train calibration rows while respecting the calibration FPR cap.
The selected threshold transferred poorly to target rows: strict no-button FPR jumped to 0.5482051282051282 and there were zero exact mouse-button true positives.

This branch remains FDM-1-recipe-shaped but is not a viable G005 promotion candidate; dynamic thresholding alone overfits prefix calibration and should not be scaled without split-robust calibration/transfer diagnostics.
next_branch_requirements: Keep the FDM-1 public recipe: video-token encoder plus non-causal masked-diffusion action-token IDM; do not promote supervised/state-table shortcuts.
Before any larger/full 4xH200 run, add split-robust calibration diagnostics or a target-invariant button-event ranking/abstention guard to prevent calibration-to-target FPR blow-up.
Preserve this artifact as negative evidence for the G005 exploration ledger, not completion evidence.
recipe_alignment: public FDM-1-shaped noncausal masked-diffusion IDM with typed masked action-token planes for mouse/key/button factors.
